MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

InputSource C++

InputSource illuminates how to get input source type and number of audio and video source.
Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\InputSource

Supported Hardware

All the Magewell capture devices, including Pro, Eco and USB Gen2/Plus Capture family

Features

  1. Obtain the signal type of the input audio and video source.
  2. Select the capture channel from multiple devices by specifying the command value.

Workflow

  1. To get device version, initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWGetVersion, MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To find the valid capture card according to the device info,, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex

  3. Conduct any of the following steps to open a channel:

    1. To open the specified channel according to the command parameter, call: MWOpenChannel;
    2. To open the first available channel by default when there is not a specified channel, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath;
  4. To get the video signal types which are supported by current capture device, and get current input video signal type, call: MWGetVideoInputSourceArray, MWGetVideoInputSource;
  5. To get the audio signal types which are supported by current capture device, and get current input audio signal type, call: MWGetAudioInputSourceArray, MWGetAudioInputSource
  6. To free up system resources and memory, call: MWCloseChannel, MWCaptureExitInstance

Result

InputSource
